easter-cakes-for-children-in-the-shape-o.name: Easter Cakes For Children In The Shape Of Animals
easter-cakes-for-children-in-the-shape-o.original_name: Monas de Pascua para niños con forma de animalitos

ingredients.item: 20 g de levadura fresca o 7 g de levadura seca
80 ml de aceite de oliva suave
Rilling of half an orange or lemon
1 yema de huevo y 1 cucharada de leche para pintar
Eggs (quantity according to the monkeys we make)
Color noodles, chocolate balls, raisins, laminated almonds...

instructions: In a small bowl, we mix 50 g of flour with 50 ml of warm milk and yeast. Let's clear up till we get a dense and sticky mass. We cover the bowl and let them stand at a hot place about 20- 30 minutes, till they are filled with bubbles and we see that they have grown and have become fluffy.

In a big bowl, we put 450 g of flour and 80 g of sugar. We make a hole at the centre and add the liquid ingredients: 80 ml of soft olive oil, 125 ml of tempered milk, 2 eggs, an orange frying and a pint of salt.

We added the startup mass to the main bowl. We first mix with a spoon or fork and, once the ingredients have been integrated, we pass the mass to the counter. We amassed for about 10-12 minutes till the dough stopped being sticky and became smooth and elastic. If you stick to your hands, you better put them with some olive oil rather than add more flour.
We form a ball and place it into a slightly greased bowl. We cover with a cloth and let them stand at a hot place, far from air currents, till they double their volume (between 1.5 and 2 hours).

Once the mass has grown, we divide it into 4 or 5 parts depending on how many monkeys you have to do. We form balls with each of them and we start giving them the form of an animal we want, we have made a turtle, a rabbit and a fish, but you can let your imagination blow up.

For example, for the turtle we get one of the balls and from that we separate another 5 pieces of similar size, for the four legs and head. With the big piece we form the body and brush with the beamed egg mixed with milk to help better stick the legs and head. Then we put an egg at the centre of his body, tighting well, and we let them rest about 45-60 minutes more in a hot place till you see them have grown in size.

With the rest of the balls we form the rest of the animals, for example an Easter rabbit in which we form our ears and legs with pieces of dough, of course you can add an egg. You can let your children help you and you will have a great time.

Una vez las figuras han vuelto a levar por segunda vez, podemos empezar a decorarlas. Para ello, volvemos a pincelar con la mezcla de huevo y leche y decoramos con bolitas de colores, pasas, smarties o almendras laminadas.

We finally baked at 180 ″ 3 ″ for about 20-25 minutes, till they are well golden. Go monitoring the oven as it will depend on the size of the monkeys, but if you see that they are getting too golden you can cover them with half baked aluminum paper. We get them out of the oven, we let them get cold, and if we want we can trade our baked eggs with some hot or chocolate eggs as a décor. That they have been "hundreds"?

easter-lamb-teleculinaria.name: Easter Lamb
instructions: Place the lamb on a tray and season with onion and garlic teeth, minced, the leaves of laurel, chopped parsley, rosemary leaves, sweet pepper, white wine, broken meat broth, salt and pepper. Wrap well and let marinate for 2 hours.
After the time indicated, add water, olive oil and butter to the lamb. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180 degrees, for 20 minutes.

Peel the shallots and potatoes, wash them and cut the shallots in half. Add to the tray, after the time indicated above, wrap and take to the oven until everything is cooked well. Remove and serve hot, decorated with a rhinestone of thyme.

eggplant-burger-with-feta-cheese-and-her.name: Eggplant Burger With Feta Cheese And Herbs
eggplant-burger-with-feta-cheese-and-her.original_name: Μπιφτέκι μελιτζάνας με φέτα και μυρωδικά

ingredients.item: A little olive oil for baking
A little olive oil for baking

instructions: Wash the eggs and remove their stem. Cut them in long slices 1 cm nick, salt them and allow them to swat for a while. Then Wash them and drag them.
In a bowl, mix the fined meat, garlic, olive oil, onion, yogurt, salt and pepper.
Add the Oregon and parsley and knead the olderients until we have a homogeneous malleable mixture.
Add a baking pan and spread to the base of the tomato slides.
Add a brush to the eggs on both sides and make half the baking pan.
Form the mixture of minced meat in long thin burgers which we touch on eggs – make sure they are as shape as possible.
We lean on each burger from a slide of tomato and close with a slide of eggplant, i.e. we make eggplant sandwiches with a burger.
Cover each with a slide of tomato, sprinkle with some olive oil and cover the baking pan with non-stick paper and aluminum foil.
Bake the food in a preheated oven at 170°C, in the air for 30 minutes until the eggs soften.
Mix in a bowl the yogurt, the crushed feta cheese and the kefagraviera.
Uncover the baking pan and add the yogurt mixture to the half-baked eggs.
Continue baking for about 15 minutes, until the surface is slightly golden.

eggs-stuffed-with-russian-salad-an-ideal.name: Eggs Stuffed With Russian Salad, An Ideal Recipe For Summer
eggs-stuffed-with-russian-salad-an-ideal.original_name: Huevos rellenos de ensaladilla rusa, una receta ideal para el verano
instructions: Put the eggs into a pot with cold water and some salt. Take water to boiling and let them cook for 10 minutes. Once cooked, remove them from hot water and place them in a cold water container to stop cooking. Peel the eggs and cut them half across. Take them back and put them back.

In a bowl we put water with two tablespoons of salt we add whole and pitted potatoes with carrot, whole and pitted. We let them cook for about 30 minutes, this depends on the size of the potatoes. When about 20 minutes have passed, we check if the potato's been baked with a fork. We remove from the casserole the potatoes and carrot, let them temple, peel and cut into crapes.
In another pan or pan, we add a teaspoon of extra virgin olive oil and cook the peas with a little salt a few minutes till they are tender.
In a large source we add potatoes and carrots cut into pits. Below we add egg yolks.
We put in the peas, well-run tuna and homemade mayonnaise.
Con una cuchara, rellena las mitades de huevo con la ensaladilla rusa. Coloca los huevos rellenos en un plato grande, listos para servir.
Decorate with a teaspoon of mayonnaise above, some peas and if you want parsley. Serve cold stuffed eggs and enjoy.

einkorn-shortbreads.name: Einkorn Shortbreads

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: heart, clover, or other shape cookie cutter (optional)

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 300°. Pulse brown sugar and powdered sugar in a food processor to combine. Add butter and pulse just until combined. Add einkorn flour, all-purpose flour, and salt and pulse until dough comes together. Turn out onto a clean surface; press into about a 6"-diameter disk.

Place dough between 2 sheets of parchment paper and roll out to a ⅓"–½"-thick round. Remove top sheet of parchment and punch out cookies with larger cutter. If using smaller cutter, punch out center of each cookie. Carefully transfer cookies to a large parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing 1" apart. Reroll scraps; punch out more cookies.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheet front to back halfway through if browning unevenly, until golden and firm around edges, 25–35 minutes. Let cool on baking sheet.
Do ahead: Cookies can be baked 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

enjoy-a-delicious-pappardelle-with-tomat.name: Enjoy A Delicious Pappardelle With Tomato And Ricotta Sauce
enjoy-a-delicious-pappardelle-with-tomat.original_name: Disfruta de un delicioso pappardelle con salsa de tomate y ricotta

ingredients.item: 200 gr de pappardelle ((puede ser fresco o seco))
200 gr de tomates maduros ((pueden usarse tomates enlatados de calidad))
2 cdas de aceite de oliva (extra virgen)
½ lemon (for a fresh and aromatic touch)
Un chorrito de vino blanco seco ((opcional))

instructions: Warm the olive oil into a large frying pan and spray the garlic with low heat until it's golden and care to avoid burning.
Add tomatoes minced into small or crushed cubes with salt, pepper and a pint of sugar. Cooking at medium heat for 10 minutes till the salsa thick.
If you wish a deeper taste, add a chorrit of white wine and let the alcohol evaporate.
He steals his dappardelle in abundant water with salt until his dente. Reserve a cup of cooking water.
Incorpora el queso ricotta a la salsa de tomate, mezcla suavemente y agrega un poco del agua de la pasta para lograr una textura cremosa.
Add the lemon frying and fresh basil leaves to purify production.
Drain the dough and mix directly into the frying pan with the salsa, ensuring that dappardelle impregnates completely.
Sirve caliente con queso parmesano rallado por encima.

erin-mckennas-thin-mint-cookies.name: Erin Mckenna's Thin Mint Cookies
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and preheat to 325°. Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper.

Whisk flour, arrowroot, xanthan gum, and baking soda in a medium bowl. Using a rubber spatula, mix coconut oil, cocoa powder, salt, and vanilla extract in a large bowl until smooth. Stir in dry ingredients until combined, then stir in applesauce.

Using a small ice cream scoop or spoon, scoop balls of dough (about the size of a small lime) onto prepared baking sheets, spacing 2" apart. Using the back of your hand or the spoon, flatten balls into ½"-thick rounds. Bake cookies, rotating once halfway through, until edges are set (cookies will firm as they cool), 12–15 minutes. Transfer parchment with cookies onto wire racks to cool.

Meanwhile, stir chocolate chips and mint extract in a medium heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water (water should not touch bowl) until melted and smooth (or heat in a microwave in 10-second increments and stir until smooth).

Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper (you can use the same sheets you baked on; either refresh the parchment or flip it over). Once cookies are cooled, dip tops of cookies into chocolate glaze and place on prepared sheet. Chill cookies to firm them up, at least 15 minutes.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be stored in the freezer for up to 1 week.

escabeche-de-verduras.name: Escabeche De Verduras
instructions: Cook carrots in a large pot of salted water until bright orange, about 2 minutes; drain and run under cold water until cool.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and cook, stirring, until golden brown, about 2 minutes. Add bell peppers, onion, and herbs and cook, stirring, until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Add carrots, chipotles, vinegar, and 1 1/4 cups water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until vegetables are soft, about 5 minutes. Season with salt; let cool.
DO AHEAD: Escabeche can be made 2 weeks ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

escarole-salad.name: Escarole Salad
instructions: Whisk shallot, anchovy, oil, vinegar, mustard, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Add escarole and toss to coat. Garnish with almonds.

ezme-sauce-argiro.name: Ezme Sauce
instructions: Place all the actors in a bowl.
Mix well.
Freeze the Ezme sauce an hour before serving.
